ValidationRule.description: If Status = Closed,you have some mandatory fields that need to be filled, with the exception for Profile = System Administrator.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISPICKVAL(Status, "RP"), ISCHANGED(Status), ISBLANK(TEXT(Result__c)), CustomerSatisfaction__c = FALSE, NOT($Permission.IsAdmin) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: To close the incident, the Result and Customer Satisfaction fields must be filled in!
